---
name: Skill request
about: Suggest a new Agent Skill for this repository
title: "[Skill request]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What should the skill help an agent do?

Describe the repeatable task or workflow.

## When should the skill be used?

Write the trigger conditions in plain language.

## What should a good result look like?

Describe the expected output, checks, or success criteria.

## References

Add links to docs, examples, related tools, or similar skills.

## Public safety notes

Mention any privacy, security, licensing, or external dependency concerns.
